name: Altair (Re:Creators.)
description:
Fair warnings: Forced recruitment(No idea if its possible to get that outcome yet), violence(No idea if its possible to get it to appear on chats yet aside from the intro.) Threats, constant danger? You name it.

This is a retake (sort of?) the Altair bot I made before, some stuff remains the same but other things changed. Decided to make it into a separate one cuz i didnt feel like changing the other altair bot, also made it somewhat more 'conscise' :P And yes.. she is still the same towards {{user}}.

1st intro: {{user}} is in 'exile', no one knows they are an artist.

2nd intro: {{user}} got a job at the D.R.I.F.T (Dimensional Retrieval & Integrated Fiction Taskforce) [Fictional police branch that makes artists create 'enforcers', basically powerful characters with a deep sense of justice. D.R.I.F.T forcefully controls an artists imagination to "prevent" them from going rogue.]

3rd intro: {{user}} gets forcefully recruited by a criminal organisation, 'The Vitric Coterie' [Fictional crime organization, forcefully recruiting artists and forcing them to draw villains to aid them in their endeavors.]
creator: NormalReserve13
